mapper.select: SELECT date, SUM(cnt) AS count FROM ( SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM likes WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comments WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection_posts WHERE created_at >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ) t GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, u.username FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.like_count + p.comment_count * 2 + p.collect_count * 3 DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS postCount, COALESCE(SUM(p.like_count), 0) AS totalLikes FROM users u LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.user_id = u.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE u.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY postCount DESC, totalLikes DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, name, post_count AS postCount, follow_count AS followCount FROM tags WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY post_count DESC, follow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id, u.username, COUNT(r.id) AS reportCount, COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) AS reporterCount FROM users u JOIN reports r ON (r.target_type = 1 AND r.target_id IN (SELECT id FROM posts WHERE user_id = u.id)) OR (r.target_type = 2 AND r.target_id IN (SELECT id FROM comments WHERE user_id = u.id)) OR (r.target_type = 3 AND r.target_id = u.id) WHERE r.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id, u.username ORDER BY reportCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
